name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna And Pumpkin 50g
description: Keep your cat happy and healthy with Spectrum Gusto 50g Tuna & Pumpkin Soup – a tasty, protein-rich, and hydrating snack for daily rewards or meal enhancement. Treat your cat to the delicious Spectrum Gusto Soup with Tuna and Pumpkin, a premium wet cat treat designed for cats and kittens of all ages. Made with 25.4% real tuna fillet and 4.7% pumpkin, this 50g pouch provides essential protein, omega fatty acids, vitamins, and fiber. Perfect as a snack, daily reward, or meal topper, it enhances hydration and makes mealtime enjoyable for even the pickiest cats. Key Features: High-Quality Tuna: Real tuna fillet for protein and omega fatty acids. Nutritious Pumpkin: Rich in vitamins and fiber for digestive health. Hydrating Broth: Encourages hydration and improves palatability. Convenient 50g Pouch: Easy to serve as a single portion or meal topper. All Ages: Safe for kittens and adult cats. Ingredients: Water, Tuna Fillet (25.4%), Pumpkin (4.7%), Fish Broth, Tapioca Starch (E1442), Guar Gum (E412) Nutritional Info: Protein 9%, Fat 0.2%, Ash 1%, Fiber 0.1%, Moisture 90% Feeding Guidelines: Serve small portions with a spoon. Complementary treat; not a complete meal. Ensure fresh drinking water is always available.
